zh.lifeSummary: 當Bernard de Balliol II於1135年出生在象牙海岸素-可莫艾格藍德-巴薩姆時，他的父親Bernard Baliol Of Bywell40歲，母親Mathilda Baliol35歲。他和Agnes de Picquigney至少有1個兒子。他去世於1188年在英國達勒姆享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

en.lifeSummary: When Bernard de Balliol II was born in 1135, in Grand-Bassam, Sud-Comoé, Côte d'Ivoire, his father, Bernard Baliol Of Bywell, was 40 and his mother, Mathilda Baliol, was 35. He had at least 1 son with Agnes de Picquigney. He died in 1188, in Durham, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bernard de Balliol II est né en 1135, à Grand-Bassam, Sud-Comoé, Côte d'Ivoire, son père, Bernard Baliol Of Bywell, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mathilda Baliol, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Agnes de Picquigney. Il est décédé en 1188, à Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Bernard de Balliol II(이)가 1135년 코트디부아르 수드-코모e 그랜드-바샘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bernard Baliol Of Bywell(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilda Baliol(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Agnes de Picquigney(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1188년 영국 뒤람에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bernard de Balliol II родился в 1135 г. в местности гранд-бассэм, суд-комоe, Кот д'Ивуар, его отцу по имени Bernard Baliol Of Bywell было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilda Baliol, 35.
